error_signature: Workflow did not finish, possible out-of-memory issue
title: Memory-related crash in sub-workflow execution
symptom: The workflow crashes at random points with an out-of-memory error, preventing completion. The error message indicates that the workflow did not finish due to potential memory issues.
not_this_if: Error does not occur with smaller datasets
root_cause: The sub-workflow may be returning hidden data or excessive data that exceeds memory limits during execution. This can happen even if the last node is set to output an empty item, as the underlying data handling may still consume significant memory.
fix_steps: Implement a webhook + Wait Node in the loop to manage data flow
Ensure that the sub-workflow does not return any hidden or excessive data
Test the workflow with the new configuration
agent_instruction: Use a webhook and Wait Node in your loop to control data flow and prevent memory issues.
